final_prompt.prompt:
Create a comprehensive UI design system in classic minimalist tech style for web dashboards, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: clean flat vector UI design system, classic minimalist tech aesthetic, Apple Human Interface Guidelines meets Material Design 3, crisp vector graphics
Subject: web dashboard layout, mobile app screens, data cards, CTA buttons, toggle switches, input fields, navigation bars, iconography set
Composition: modular component library view, organized grid presentation showing desktop and mobile variants side by side
Scene/backdrop: neutral gray canvas background, generous whitespace, organized spacing system
Color palette: slate gray and charcoal as base, electric blue as primary accent, subtle gradients for depth, high contrast for accessibility
Materials/textures: smooth matte surfaces, subtle drop shadows for elevation, glassmorphism effects on cards, crisp 1px borders
Constraints: components must be scalable and reusable; all elements must maintain 8px grid alignment; dark and light mode variants implied
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures; 3D renders; photorealistic elements; cluttered layouts; excessive decorative flourishes; neon overload
